title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Treebo Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Treebo Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Treebo Hotels in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
